summary: The ExEx backfill job divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in early return/break expressions; no range iteration, batching, gas accounting, or job execution behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 112: M	crates/exex/exex/src/backfill/job.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return None` to `return None;` and `break` to `break;`.
No branch condition, loop condition, gas budget check, backfill range selection, or execution side effect changed.
